prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large cyan rubber sphere
  - obj_1: large green rubber cube
  - obj_2: small brown metal cube
  - obj_3: small green rubber sphere
  - obj_4: large purple metal cube
  - obj_5: large yellow rubber cube
  - obj_6: large purple metal cylinder
  - obj_7: large blue rubber sphere
  - obj_8: large red rubber cylinder
  - obj_9: small cyan metal cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0321] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0322] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0323] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0324] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0325] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0326] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0327] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0328] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0329] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0330] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0331] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0332] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0333] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0334] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0335] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_8 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0336] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0337] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0338] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0339] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0340] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
